title: AI Chat Service

key_classes.name: AIChatService
public_methods: getFallbackModel(modelId, triedIds, triedProviders): Promise<{fallbackProvider, fallbackModelId} | undefined>

key_classes.name: ChatAPIService
routes_registered: Router middleware: openai/completions, openai/chat_completions, openai/responses, anthropic/messages, video/proxy

key_classes.name: AIInterfaceService
interfaces_registered: puter-chat-completion: { models(), list(), complete(messages, tools, vision, stream, model, provider, temperature, max_tokens, ...) }
puter-tts: { list_voices(), list_engines(), synthesize(text, voice, language, ...) }

key_classes.name: IChatProvider
methods: checkModeration(text: string): Promise<{ flagged: boolean, results: ModerationCreateResponse }>

key_relationships: AIChatService extends BaseService
ChatAPIService extends BaseService
AIInterfaceService extends BaseService
AIChatService implements 'puter-chat-completion' interface (via IMPLEMENTS static)
AIChatService composes IChatProvider (1 to many, keyed by provider name string)
AIChatService composes IChatModel (1 to many, via modelIdMap)
AIChatService depends_on MeteringService (getter via services locator)
AIChatService depends_on EventService (getter via services locator)
AIChatService depends_on DriverService (getter via services locator)
AIChatService depends_on ErrorService (getter via services locator)
AIChatService depends_on BaseDatabaseAccessService (getter via services locator)
AIChatService depends_on concurrentRequestLimiter (module-level singleton)
AIChatService uses AIChatRedisCacheSpace.fallbackModelsKey (Redis key factory)
AIChatService uses redisClient (Redis singleton for fallback cache reads)
AIChatService uses setRedisCacheValue (Redis cache write utility)
AIChatService uses AsModeration (moderation fallback via Claude provider)
AIChatService uses normalize_messages, normalize_single_message, extract_text (message utils)
AIChatService uses normalize_tools_object (function calling utils)
AIChatService uses Streaming.AIChatStream (streaming response wrapper)
AIChatService uses TypedValue (stream runtime type)
ChatAPIService depends_on AIChatService (via services.get('ai-chat'))
ChatAPIService depends_on SUService (via services.get('su') for sudo elevation)
AIInterfaceService depends_on RegistryService (via services.get('registry'))
All providers implement IChatProvider interface
complete_method_flow: 5. complete() → moderate({ messages }) [calls openai checkModeration, fallback: AsModeration(claude)]
8. complete() → meteringService.getRemainingUsage(actor) [to calc max output tokens]
13. Stream path: new PassThrough() → TypedValue → Streaming.AIChatStream → res.init_chat_stream()
important_notes: MAX_FALLBACKS=4 (includes first attempt). Fallback logic: same model different provider first, then euclidean-distance-sorted alternatives from Redis cache.
Concurrent request limits: default=3, temp_free=3, user_free=5; configurable via subscriptionLimits in config.
Moderation: OpenAI moderation API primary; Claude claude-3-haiku-20240307 via AsModeration as fallback. Skipped for ollama/local.
Provider registration is event-driven: extensions can add providers via 'ai.chat.registerProviders' event.
Redis key pattern for fallback cache: 'aichat:fallbacks:{modelId}'
Driver interface 'puter-chat-completion' is implemented directly on AIChatService via static IMPLEMENTS object, delegating to instance methods.
ChatAPIService serves public (unauthenticated) model listing endpoints; uses SUService.sudo() elevation to access AIChatService.
AIInterfaceService registers all AI driver interfaces (ocr, chat, image, video, tts, s2s, s2t) into the registry service at boot.
Streaming responses return TypedValue with content_type 'application/x-ndjson'; non-streaming returns message+usage+finish_reason.
